name: AI Web Production
description: AI-native web production pipeline for Claude Code. Runs from brief to structure, Figma MCP handoff, frontend build plan, and validation — for webpages, websites, and web services.
author: d3fau1t-design

commands.name: Web Product Pipeline
commands.description: Run an AI-native web production pipeline for a webpage, website, or web service from brief to UX structure, design handoff, frontend build plan, and validation.

commands.name: Web Design Handoff
commands.description: Turn a webpage, website, or web service brief into Figma MCP-ready frames, tokens, components, and execution steps.

commands.name: Web Build
commands.description: Convert a webpage, website, or web service spec into a frontend implementation plan, and implement only when a real codebase already exists.

commands.name: Homepage Pipeline
commands.description: Specialized homepage and landing page variant of the web product pipeline.

commands.name: Homepage Figma Handoff
commands.description: Specialized Figma MCP handoff spec for homepage and landing page structure.

commands.name: Homepage Build
commands.description: Specialized frontend build command for homepage scope.

agents.name: Web Production Agent
agents.description: Orchestrates the full web production pipeline from brief intake to frontend planning.

agents.name: Design Handoff Agent
agents.description: Specializes in producing Figma MCP-ready design specs from brief or IA.

skills.name: Brief Intake
skills.description: Validates and structures a web project brief from raw user input.

skills.name: IA Generator
skills.description: Generates information architecture, sitemap, and user flows from a validated brief.

skills.name: Figma Spec Writer
skills.description: Produces Figma MCP-ready design specs including tokens, components, and copy placeholders.

skills.name: Frontend Planner
skills.description: Produces a frontend implementation plan or scaffold spec from a design and IA.

hooks.description: Validates brief completeness before pipeline execution.
Writes figma-spec.md and confirms output path after design handoff.
Writes frontend-plan.md and surfaces a validation checklist after build.

proposals.description: Proposes the full pipeline run when a new web project brief is detected.
Proposes running web-design-handoff after product structure is produced.
Proposes running web-build after figma-spec.md is written.

templates.name: Web Project Brief
templates.description: Standard brief template for a web project.

templates.name: Homepage Brief
templates.description: Shorter brief template scoped to homepage and landing page projects.

defaults.description: Default stack, output paths, and behavior flags for the pipeline.
